name: harness-kit
description: Reusable Codex workflow harness with docs templates, issue-first execution rules, technical learning notes, and sub-agent playbooks.

interface.shortDescription: Reusable Codex docs harness, issue workflow, learning-note, and sub-agent skills.
interface.longDescription: A reusable Codex plugin for bootstrapping project docs, tracking implementation through issue docs, writing technical learning notes, and using sub-agents in a disciplined way.
defaultPrompt: Bootstrap this repository with the harness docs templates.
Set up an issue-driven implementation workflow for this repo.
Write a technical learning note from this implementation.
